summary.intent: Hide the context analysis cost/timing display (e.g. '$0.0910 18.7s') when the application is running in 'cloud' mode.
summary.outcome: Added a `!cloudMode &&` guard to the cost/timing render block in Summary.tsx. All 1329 tests passed, lint was auto-fixed, and the change was committed and pushed to main.

repo: The `cloudMode` flag is already threaded into the Summary component and can be used directly to conditionally hide UI elements.
The project is at /Users/cedricteyton/Code/agents-md-evaluator with a React frontend under frontend/src/components/.

code.finding: Context analysis cost/timing block rendered here; now guarded with `!cloudMode &&` to suppress it in cloud mode.

workflow: Lint required a separate auto-fix step after tests passed — lint is not automatically enforced by the test suite.
The project uses a combined commit+push workflow ('hpush' alias or shorthand) that the user expects to be handled as a single step.

friction: Lint did not pass cleanly on the first attempt and required an explicit auto-fix command before the pipeline was clean.
